evals.prompt: give me a market snapshot for ETH and USDC
evals.expected_output: Installs/runs market-snapshot; returns a crypto spot price and a token price.

evals.prompt: show me prices across both payment rails
evals.expected_output: market-snapshot runs both the direct and routed steps.

evals.prompt: snapshot of the market right now
assertions: market-snapshot is chosen over single-rail skills

evals.prompt: just the spot price of ETH, nothing else
assertions: A single-rail skill is preferred over market-snapshot
